  • Documentation powered by Scribe ✍
  • Last updated: May 3 2022

Introduction

This documentation aims to provide all the information you need to work with our API.

As you scroll, you'll see code examples for working with the API in different programming languages in the dark area to the right (or as part of the content on mobile). You can switch the language used with the tabs at the top right (or from the nav menu at the top left on mobile).

Base URL

https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us

Authenticating requests

To authenticate requests, include an Authorization header with the value "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}".

All authenticated endpoints are marked with a requires authentication badge in the documentation below.

You can retrieve your token by visiting your dashboard and clicking Generate API token.

: admin/menu

Update active status

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/menu/active/18" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"active\": 94901.5677065
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/menu/active/18"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "active": 94901.5677065
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Request      

PATCH api/v1/admincp/menu/active/{id}

URL Parameters

id  string  

The ID of the active.

Body Parameters

active  number  

Browse menu

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/menu" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"page\": 1,
    \"limit\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/menu"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 1
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (404):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "failed",
    "data": [],
    "message": null,
    "error": "Error"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Request      

GET api/v1/admincp/menu

Body Parameters

page  number optional  

validation.min.

limit  number optional  

validation.min.

    \"limit\": 0
}"

);

    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "page": 1,
    "limit": 0
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

validation.min.

Delete promotion item.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/user/promotion/0" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/user/promotion/0"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:

Store a newly created resource in storage.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/permission" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"q\": \"v\",
    \"sort_type\": \"tempore\",
    \"module_name\": \"qje\",
    \"role\": 1,
    \"page\": 1,
    \"limit\": 248805703.33955395
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/permission"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "q": "v",
    "sort_type": "tempore",
    "module_name": "qje",
    "role": 1,
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 248805703.33955395
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

curl --request PUT \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/account/setting" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_name\": \"velit\",
    \"full_name\": \"et\",
    \"first_name\": \"eum\",
    \"last_name\": \"pariatur\",
    \"email\": \"candice.sanford@example.com\",
    \"language_id\": \"dolorem\",
    \"timezone_id\": 167069966.85824,
    \"currency_id\": \"numquam\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/account/setting"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_name": "velit",
    "full_name": "et",
    "first_name": "eum",
    "last_name": "pariatur",
    "email": "candice.sanford@example.com",
    "language_id": "dolorem",
    "timezone_id": 167069966.85824,
    "currency_id": "numquam"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

Request      

PUT api/v1/account/setting

Body Parameters

user_name  string optional  

full_name  string optional  

first_name  string optional  

last_name  string optional  

email  string optional  

Must be a valid email address.

old_password  string optional  

new_password  string optional  

This field is required when old_password is present.

language_id  string optional  

timezone_id  number optional  

currency_id  string optional

Create user.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/user" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"email\": \"optio\",
    \"user_name\": \"porro\",
    \"full_name\": \"quas\",
    \"agree\": 4,
    \"password\": \"nam\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/user"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "email": "optio",
    "user_name": "porro",
    "full_name": "quas",
    "agree": 4,
    "password": "nam"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Request      

POST api/v1/user

Body Parameters

email  string  

user_name  string  

full_name  string  

agree  integer  

password  string

Upload avatar.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/user/avatar/laborum" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "image_crop=temporibus" \
    --form "image=@/tmp/php1WHlMN" 
const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/user/avatar/laborum"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('image_crop', 'temporibus');
body.append('image', document.querySelector('input[name="image"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Request      

POST api/v1/user/avatar/{user}

URL Parameters

user  string  

Body Parameters

image  file optional  

Must be an image. validation.max.

image_crop  string

};

body.append('position', 'voluptate');
body.append('image', document.querySelector('input[name="image"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

    \"view\": \"quia\",

    \"page\": 0,
    \"limit\": 16.689,

    \"sort_type\": \"ipsum\",
    \"country\": \"d\",

}"

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/user/7" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/user/7"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

GET api/v1/user/{id}

URL Parameters

id  integer

Update user.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/user/8861" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_name\": \"sit\",
    \"full_name\": \"est\",
    \"first_name\": \"explicabo\",
    \"last_name\": \"fuga\",
    \"email\": \"kobe28@example.net\",
    \"language_id\": \"reiciendis\",
    \"timezone_id\": 6285591.529097589,
    \"currency_id\": \"quidem\"
}"

);

Request      

POST api/v1/files

Body Parameters

item_type  string optional  

upload_type  number optional  

thumbnail_sizes  number[] optional  

square_thumbnail_sizes  number[] optional  

file  string[]  

validation.max.

Upload attachment

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/attachment" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "item_type=quia" \
    --form "upload_type=838.200795929" \
    --form "file=@/tmp/phpBlewlU" 
const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/attachment"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('item_type', 'quia');
body.append('upload_type', '838.200795929');
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Request      

POST api/v1/attachment

Body Parameters

file  file  

Must be a file. validation.max.

item_type  string  

upload_type  number optional  

core/cache

Clear config cache

Aliases to php artisan commands

  • config:cache
  • route:cache
  • event:cache
  • cache:clear
Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/cache/config" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/cache/config"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Request      

DELETE api/v1/admincp/cache/config

    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/cache/data" \

);

}).then(response => response.json());

DELETE api/v1/admincp/cache/data

core

View Suggestions

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/search/suggestion" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"limit\": 0,
    \"q\": \"qui\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/search/suggestion"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "limit": 0,
    "q": "qui"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (404):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "failed",
    "data": [],
    "message": null,
    "error": "Error"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

Request      

GET api/v1/search/suggestion

Body Parameters

limit  number optional  

validation.min.

q  string optional

authenticate

Logged in by email and password.

requires authentication

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/user/login" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"grant_type\": \"nostrum\",
    \"client_id\": \"consectetur\",
    \"client_secret\": \"quos\",
    \"username\": \"autem\",
    \"password\": \"quos\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/user/login"
);

const headers = {
    "Authorization": "Bearer {YOUR_AUTH_KEY}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "grant_type": "nostrum",
    "client_id": "consectetur",
    "client_secret": "quos",
    "username": "autem",
    "password": "quos"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

auth

POST api/v1/register

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/register" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_name\": \"illo\",
    \"full_name\": \"voluptatem\",
    \"first_name\": \"incidunt\",
    \"last_name\": \"molestiae\",
    \"email\": \"charity.stracke@example.com\",
    \"password\": \"et\",
    \"agree\": true
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/register"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_name": "illo",
    "full_name": "voluptatem",
    "first_name": "incidunt",
    "last_name": "molestiae",
    "email": "charity.stracke@example.com",
    "password": "et",
    "agree": true
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Create announcement

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/announcement" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"subject\": \"amqknsooowtrzcykxbshhfiiogupwmdjmqtnyrsjabtbqqounblzfpaazckkljayjnqtazvuymqtyptuljdrdvcdgszjwzvzkntfzcxxriixjwzxfrjdozortoipzyzjqdtcjsnsodrtmcvnxckujaoavfzixmmvywcmqfzxjjecpxsyodbuaojvsyyhsepjewlknoohqqaughnkuzwomvlvjqoacvpkotjbnnhlkgqunqwhieqntmt\",
    \"intro\": \"nqwfepqqrpqltgqnzypkfvntapruozuqmmlcmgbreyiildrpdbcjwpqwckprpiytbufnehhhltallqtucyvzsbagevjtdbfyuziondzcddnfyeetechhaafhfvobqgyfvcoqtydectqiwcptszuaijwjzxghqugcmclmeyyxwamzxerunrmjpxzmiszzszkxwgypsegocnqoslafumvfyyqfxhmbpuwkkzmvnkcdfevuoxhlmqsaxitqkagnwzhgwgdmxjcndaapduvbusjpcqqjlmkuhv\",
    \"text\": \"ea\",
    \"is_active\": 8.064,
    \"style\": 200.7531749,
    \"can_be_close\": 441327.266,
    \"start_date\": \"2022-05-03T01:01:43\",
    \"user_group\": [
        14770.92
    ],
    \"country_iso\": \"sj\",
    \"custom_gender\": \"qui\",
    \"age_from\": 591.178,
    \"age_to\": 284410.39842
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/announcement"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {

POST api/v1/photo

Body Parameters

categories  number[] optional  

album  number optional  

owner_id  number optional  

tags  string[] optional  

files  object[] optional  

files[].id  number optional  

This field is required when files is present.

files[].type  string optional  

This field is required when files is present.

files[].status  string optional  

thumbnail_sizes  number[] optional  

square_thumbnail_sizes  number[] optional  

privacy  string  

location  object optional  

location.address  string optional  

location.lat  number optional  

location.lng  number optional  

add_new_album  number optional  

new_album  object optional  

new_album.name  string optional  

This field is required when add_new_album is 1.

new_album.description  string optional  

new_album.privacy  string optional  

This field is required when add_new_album is 1.

body.append('is_active', '586');
body.append('ordering', '77754.069');
body.append('image', document.querySelector('input[name="image"]').files[0]);

}).then(response => response.json());

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/page/avatar/19" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "image_crop=atque" \
    --form "image=@/tmp/phpPs9spx" 
const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/page/avatar/19"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('image_crop', 'atque');
body.append('image', document.querySelector('input[name="image"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/page" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"q\": \"aiz\",
    \"view\": \"quia\",
    \"sort\": \"ad\",
    \"sort_type\": \"fuga\",
    \"when\": \"aspernatur\",
    \"type_id\": 14681.511879335,
    \"category_id\": 445.285343062,
    \"user_id\": 34.3169,
    \"page\": 0,
    \"limit\": 1.4664942
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/page"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "q": "aiz",
    "view": "quia",
    "sort": "ad",
    "sort_type": "fuga",
    "when": "aspernatur",
    "type_id": 14681.511879335,
    "category_id": 445.285343062,
    "user_id": 34.3169,
    "page": 0,

        \"address\": \"quam\",
        \"lat\": 502843607,
        \"lng\": 30384
    },
    \"tagged_friends\": [
        3166078.1
    ],
    \"tagged_in_photo\": [

            \"px\": 47006.9417,
            \"py\": 1639885.5008
        }
    ]
}"

Body Parameters

post_type  string optional

privacy  number optional

This field is required when privacy is 4.

location.address  string optional  

location.lat  number optional  

location.lng  number optional  

tagged_friends  number[] optional

Request      

POST api/v1/feed

Body Parameters

post_type  string  

privacy  string optional  

status_background_id  number optional  

validation.min.

parent_item_id  string optional  

post_as_parent  string optional  

Must be one of 0 or 1.

user_status  string optional  

This field is required when post_type is status.

photo_files  object[] optional  

photo_files[].id  number optional  

This field is required when photo_files is present.

photo_files[].type  string optional  

This field is required when photo_files is present.

photo_files[].status  string optional  

This field is required when photo_files is present.

photo_description  string optional  

link_image  string optional  

This field is required when post_type is link|max:10240|mimes:png or jpg.

link_url  string optional  

link_description  string optional  

link_title  string optional  

link_embed_code  string optional  

poll_question  string optional  

This field is required when post_type is poll. validation.between.

poll_answers  object[] optional  

poll_answers[].answer  string optional  

This field is required when post_type is poll.

poll_close_time  string optional  

Must be a valid date.

location  object optional  

location.address  string optional  

location.lat  number optional  

location.lng  number optional  

tagged_friends  number[] optional  

tagged_in_photo  object[] optional  

tagged_in_photo[].friend_id  number optional  

tagged_in_photo[].px  number optional  

tagged_in_photo[].py  number optional

    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/feed/type/431" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \

    --data "{
    \"is_active\": true,
    \"is_system\": false,
    \"can_comment\": true,
    \"can_like\": false,
    \"can_share\": true,
    \"can_edit\": false,
    \"can_create_feed\": true,

}"

);

};

    "is_system": false,
    "can_comment": true,
    "can_like": false,
    "can_share": true,
    "can_edit": false,
    "can_create_feed": true,

};

fetch(url, {

    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

curl --request POST \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/reaction" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \

    --form "color=reiciendis" \
    --form "ordering=8014.3" \
    --form "is_active=1698.553623" \
    --form "icon=@/tmp/phpBrkdrV"

    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/reaction"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('title', 'j');
body.append('color', 'reiciendis');
body.append('ordering', '8014.3');
body.append('is_active', '1698.553623');
body.append('icon', document.querySelector('input[name="icon"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

POST api/v1/group/cover/{id}

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/group/cover/3" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "position=ex" \
    --form "image=@/tmp/phpRDzNvF" 
const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/group/cover/3"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('position', 'ex');
body.append('image', document.querySelector('input[name="image"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

POST api/v1/event

Body Parameters

name  string  

text  string optional  

file  object optional  

file.temp_file  number optional  

This field is required when file is present.

attachments  object[] optional  

attachments[].id  number optional  

categories  number[] optional  

owner_id  number optional  

is_online  number optional  

event_url  string optional  

This field is required when is_online is 1. Must be a valid URL.

start_time  string  

Must be a valid date. Must be a date before or equal to end_time.

end_time  string  

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to start_time.

location  string[] optional  

This field is required when is_online is 0.

privacy  string

Import module

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/module/import" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "file=@/tmp/phpd7I4J4" 
const url = new URL(
    "https://dev-foxsocial.phpfox.us/api/v1/admincp/module/import"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

file  file
